SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_DESC: Vince hostem infligendo 1000% eius maximae valetudinis in vulnere.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_MASTERY_DESC: Ut Executioner, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_GRANDMASTERY: Ut Executioner, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_WASTELANDER_: Ut Executioner, aperi portam antiquam in Abandoned Aqueduct.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_ELECTRO_DESC: Ut Executioner, vince Overloading Vermem utendo Execution.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_EXECUTIONER_SWINGAXE_DES: Ut Executioner, interfice 12 hostes uno usu Execution.
